calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, May 19, 2016 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Appellant/Defendant Joseph Miller.
Andrew Crinnion, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Ryan Aanerud.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Andrew Crinnion and witness Ryan Aanerud are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Andrew Crinnion testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - rent board decision (returned to Mr. Crinnion)
(B) - Itemized rent payment

Mr. Aaneurd testifies on behalf of Respondent and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence (B) is retained and exhibit (A) is returned by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Judgment Entered
